name: Allure Limousines Inc
fit_notes: Not a fit. 6-employee Indianapolis livery/limousine operator with no evidence of school-bus or special-needs student transportation contracts. Listed website is an Australian domain, suggesting data quality issue. Too small and wrong segment for a Summit tuck-in.

name: Citizens Transportation LLC
website: indy.gov (listed; not the company's own site)
fit_notes: Not a fit. Tiny 6-employee Indianapolis operator with no web presence beyond directory listings and no evidence of school-bus contracts. Reported website is indy.gov which is the city portal, not the company. Insufficient signal for Summit tuck-in.

name: TLCM LLC
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER snapshot reports ~79 power units, 86 drivers, ~2.2M annual miles (2024).
fit_notes: Marginal. TLC Transportation (DOT 2291752) is a Long Island NEMT/ambulette operator serving hospitals, dialysis, behavioral and rehab clients — not K-12 school routes. Fleet of ~79 units is meaningful but in adjacent paratransit segment; would only be a fit if Summit is explicitly expanding into NEMT/SPED-adjacent NY work.

name: Towne Executive
fit_notes: Not a fit. 5-employee Roswell GA limo/executive-car business operating from a PO box, no evidence of school bus or special-needs student transportation. Not a Summit target. (Note: not affiliated with the unrelated Long Island Towne Bus Corp., a WE Transport/Beacon Mobility subsidiary.)

name: Barukh Transportation LLC
fit_notes: Not a fit. 5-employee Palmetto GA entity with no web presence, no confirmed school-bus operations, and a listed website that appears to be an unrelated consulting domain. Insufficient signal to qualify as a Summit tuck-in target.
